title: BEM-875 final token probe
objective:
Run script:
"""
mail = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_RESPONSE.md')
text = mail.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if mail.exists() else ''
tokens = ['Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES','Findings:','Evidence:','Agreed changes:','Strategic options:','Recommendation:']
flags = []
for token in tokens:
    flags.append(token.replace(':','').replace(' ','_') + '_' + str(token in text))
flags.append('len_' + str(len(text)))
safe = '_'.join(flags).replace('True','T').replace('False','F')[:190]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM875_FINAL_TOKEN_PROBE_' + safe + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-875 final token probe\nFlags: ' + safe + '\n\nText:\n' + text[:12000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM875 final token probe: ' + safe)
"""
No issue comments.
